alpha.url: The property consists of a primary structure situated within a developed site containing paved vehicle circulation and parking areas. Multiple access routes connect the property to surrounding roadways. Additional structures, landscaped sections, and developed features are visible throughout the surrounding area.

bravo.url: The view shows the primary structure surrounded by paved circulation areas and adjacent parking spaces. Vehicle access is provided by multiple driveways connecting to surrounding roadways. Additional developed features and nearby structures are visible around the property perimeter.

delta.url: The view shows the primary structure bordered by paved circulation areas and parking spaces on multiple sides. Driveways connect the site to surrounding roadways and neighboring developed areas. Additional structures, landscaped sections, and site features are visible throughout the surrounding property.
